1400 Buttermilk Road, Lenoir City, Tennessee 37771, United States

Meadowdale Farm and Sawmill

Call nowVisit website
Call nowVisit website

About this farm

At Meadowdale Farm, we are a family-owned and veteran-owned business passionate about raising the highest quality pasture-based meats and eggs since 1999. We raise our chickens and turkeys in small batches using grain sourced from nearby Georgia. We love working with Farm to Table restaurants, caterers, as well as with customers that are looking for delicious, flavorful, nutrient dense poultry. We prioritize sustainability and animal welfare in all our practices. We do not use herbicides in our fields, ensuring a natural and healthy environment for our animals and produce. We offer a variety of poultry products, including whole chickens and parts like thighs, boneless breasts, and wings. For pet owners, we also provide hard-to-find ingredients such as raw chicken feet and organs. In addition to poultry, we offer sawmilling services for custom timber frames, historic renovations, and lumber. We sell natural bark mulch for gardens and garden compost, supporting your gardening needs. Our farm also provides homesteading, woodlot management, and sawmill consultations, sharing our expertise with others. Recently, we relocated our farm to Tennessee, where we are blessed with an additional 90 days of grazing season! As our farm regrows, we will be reintroducing grass-fed lamb, forest-raised pork, and grass-fed beef into our offerings. We are dedicated to reviving America's local food systems, where animal welfare, nutrient density, and soil health are of the utmost importance. Our poultry is USDA inspected, and we are proud members of the American Pastured Poultry Producers Association, the Farmer Veteran Coalition, and our county TN Farm Bureau. Connect with us on Instagram, Facebook, or our website to learn more and stay updated on our latest offerings and activities. Please call/email us to set up a time for you to come visit and pick up some meat!
